collision energy: collision-induced dissociation (CID) activation energy, 35% collision energy
instrument: using a Q Exactive hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap MS/MS system
ionization type: Electrospray ionization (ESI) was used in both positive and negative modes
labeling: Relative protein abundance in primed and control guard cell samples was measured using label-free quantification
reduction reagent: reduced using 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 22 °C for 1 h
